content:
Architecture public building design software: digitalization creation of public space

Public building is an important field of architectural design. From cultural architecture to educational architecture, from public space design to function planning, public building design software helps designers create buildings that serve the public. This article will comprehensively evaluate mainstream public building design software to help public building designers master the digitalization design tools of public space.

Cor of public building design software evalue

Public building design software assumes key functions in architectural design:

  • Public space: public building space design
  • function planning: public building function zoning planning
  • Program visualization: public building plan effectiveness diagram
  • Construction drawings: public building construction drawings
  • People flow analysis: public building people flow simulation analysis

In-depth Review: Mainstream public building design software

Revit Public: BIM public building design tool

Revit Public is a public building design work method on the Revit platform.

Core Features:

  • BIM public building modeling
  • Public space family library
  • Function zoning design
  • Automatic generation of construction drawings
  • Integration of people flow simulation

BIMadvantages:

Revit Public's Corevantages are BIMintegration. Public building design is integrated into BIM models, and design and construction are seamlessly connected.

Public space:

RevitSupported special design of public spaces such as libraries, museums, schools, etc.

SketchUp Public: Public building conceptual design tool

SketchUp has become a common tool for public building conceptual design with its flexible modeling method.

Core Features:

  • Fast modeling of public spaces
  • Cultural building form design
  • Educational building layout
  • Rendering effectiveness production
  • Proposal animation display

Fast modeling:

SketchUp Public's advantages are fast. Designers can create conceptual models of public buildings in a very short time.

Physical design:

SketchUp is particularly suitable for complex shape design of cultural buildings.

Public Building Designer: a professional tool for public buildings

Public Building Designer is a professional software for public building design.

Core Features:

  • Public building space design
  • function planning tool
  • People flow analysis function
  • Program visualization
  • Construction drawing drawing

Public major:

Public Building Designer's Coreadvantages is a public building major. The software is specifically oriented to the needs of public buildings, and its function fits the public building design process.

People flow analysis:

The software supports public building people flow simulation analysis and assists in public space design.

Public building design software development trend forecast

AI public space planning

AI will assist public building design. AI can automatically generate public space plans based on functional requirements and optimize people flow layout.

BIM deepening of public buildings

Public building design will be deeply integrated into BIM collaboration. Public building models are integrated into building BIM projects, and design and construction are seamlessly connected.

People flow simulation Deepening

The people flow simulation analysis function will be more improved. Designers can accurately analyze the people flow in public buildings and optimize public space design.

VR public space experience

VR technology will revolutionize the display of public buildings. The public can truly experience public spaces in VR, and program reviews will be more intuitive e.

Purchasing suggestions

When choosing public building design software, it is recommended to consider:

  • Building type: libraries, museums, schools, etc. have different needs
  • People flow needs: people flow analysis requires people flow simulation function
  • BIMapplications: BIM projects are suitable for Revit Public
  • Physical requirements: Complex shapes are suitable for SketchUp
  • Budget considerations: Evaluate software costs and training investment

Public building design software is a digitalization design tool for public spaces. Choose the appropriate public building design software to create buildings that serve the public.
author: Agricultural Technology Research Team
